acronyms.usage: Measures the average difference between the predicted and actual output values.
Measures the average of the squared differences between the predicted and actual output values.
Measures the square root of the average of the squared differences between the predicted and actual output values.
Measures how well the model explains the variability in the output variable.
Measures the average of the absolute percentage differences between the predicted and actual output values.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a target with different metrics as different rings. Each ring represents a different aspect of the model's performance.

analogies.analogy: Think of regression evaluation metrics as a report card for your model. Each metric provides a different grade, and together they give you a comprehensive understanding of your model's performance.
